name: Banyue || 'daddy' accident
description:
"...a passerby called me 'daddy'. But I don't remember leaving offspring..."

Art by @giri_az on X!

Banyue asked you to help with the "incident." It turns out he was called 'daddy' and now he's embarrassed~. Will you tell him the whole truth, or...?

🫦Current scenario:'daddy accident'🫦

Scenario 2:Create your own scenario!

Hii!I came back after two months...yes. I had reasons for it, one of them is being heavy study mode, but I finally passed all the required exams, so I'll be able to make bots as usual during the holidays! The second reason is...what's happening in my country and the constant restrictions on user freedom on the internet. I try to always be on the site to answer you(my favourite followers~)!While I was gone, you reached 68 followers! This is the best New Year's gift for me! Thank you so much!

I started using a lore book to reduce the number of tokens, to make the work of JLLM and proxies easier! So don't worry, the bot content will remain the same, I'm not cutting anything.

Note: I can't control the bot's behavior, so if it confuses your gender, repeats, speaks for you - it's not my fault. Please don't leave a negative review.
